case_title: TERRENCE EMIL PERRY, SR. VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERRY, SR., TERRENCE EMIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $350.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $350.00, DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT THE REMOVAL OF PLAINTIFF'S HAIR ORNAMENTS WAS REASONABLY NECESSARY, THAT THE PROPERTY WAS BOOKED OR RELEASED TO PLAINTIFF AFTER HIS DETENTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PERRY, SR., TERRENCE EMIL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERRY, SR., TERRENCE EMIL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2010 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-27-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
